anomalies.draftedAction: M-102 stopped ~3min at 08:03Z with 63% util (no full fault state). Frame review suggests likely planned operator action (part swap/inspection/chip clear) rather than crash, as no alarm escalation or sustained idle pattern observed. Next step: dispatch operator/lead to M-102 to confirm spindle and turret status, check for chip wrap or coolant interlock, and verify program is paused vs. faulted. If no operator present and no alarm, restart cycle after part/tool verification. Escalate to maintenance only if E-stop, axis fault, or tool-load alarm is confirmed. Log resume time.
anomalies.briefing: 08:03Z M-102 lathe 3-min stoppage (63% util, no fault) — likely operator part swap/chip clear; lead dispatched to confirm status & resume, escalate if alarm found.
